en: If then you have been raised with Christ, seek the things that are above, where Christ is, seated at the right hand of God.
zh: 所以，你們既然與基督一同復活，就應當尋求天上的事，那裡有基督坐在 神的右邊。

en: Set your minds on things that are above, not on things that are on earth.
zh: 你們要思念的，是天上的事，不是地上的事。

en: For you have died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
zh: 因為你們已經死了，你們的生命與基督一同隱藏在 神裡面。

en: When Christ who is your life appears, then you also will appear with him in glory.
zh: 基督就是你們的生命，他顯現的時候，你們也要和他一同在榮耀裡顯現。

en: Put to death therefore what is earthly in you: sexual immorality, impurity, passion, evil desire, and covetousness, which is idolatry.
zh: 所以要治死你們在地上的肢體，就如淫亂、污穢、邪情、惡慾和貪心，貪心就是拜偶像。

en: On account of these the wrath of God is coming.
zh: 因著這些事， 神的忿怒必要臨到悖逆的人 。

en: In these you too once walked, when you were living in them.
zh: 你們從前在其中生活的時候，也曾經這樣行過。

en: But now you must put them all away: anger, wrath, malice, slander, and obscene talk from your mouth.
zh: 但現在你們要除去忿怒、惱怒、惡毒、毀謗，以及粗言穢語這一切事。

en: Do not lie to one another, seeing that you have put off the old self with its practices
zh: 不要彼此說謊，因為你們已經脫去了舊人和舊人的行為，

en: and have put on the new self, which is being renewed in knowledge after the image of its creator.
zh: 穿上了新人。這新人照著他的創造者的形象漸漸更新，能夠充分認識主。

en: Here there is not Greek and Jew, circumcised and uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave, free; but Christ is all, and in all.
zh: 在這一方面，並不分希臘人和猶太人，受割禮的和未受割禮的，未開化的人和西古提人，奴隸和自由人，唯有基督是一切，也在一切之內。

en: Put on then, as God's chosen ones, holy and beloved, compassion, kindness, humility, meekness, and patience,
zh: 所以，你們既然是 神所揀選的，是聖潔、蒙愛的人，就要存憐憫的心腸、恩慈、謙卑、溫柔和忍耐。

en: bearing with one another and, if one has a complaint against another, forgiving each other; as the Lord has forgiven you, so you also must forgive.
zh: 如果有人對別人有嫌隙，總要彼此寬容，互相饒恕；主怎樣饒恕了你們，你們也要照樣饒恕人。

en: And above all these put on love, which binds everything together in perfect harmony.
zh: 在這一切之上，還要有愛心，愛心是聯繫全德的。

en: And let the peace of Christ rule in your hearts, to which indeed you were called in one body. And be thankful.
zh: 又要讓基督的平安在你們心裡作主；你們蒙召歸為一體，也是為了這個緣故。你們要有感謝的心。

en: Let the word of Christ dwell in you richly, teaching and admonishing one another in all wisdom, singing psalms and hymns and spiritual songs, with thankfulness in your hearts to God.
zh: 你們要讓基督的道豐豐富富地住在你們心裡，以各樣的智慧，彼此教導，互相勸戒，用詩章、聖詩、靈歌，懷著感恩的心歌頌 神。

en: And whatever you do, in word or deed, do everything in the name of the Lord Jesus, giving thanks to God the Father through him.
zh: 凡你們所作的，無論是言語或行為，都要奉主耶穌的名，藉著他感謝父 神。

en: Wives, submit to your husbands, as is fitting in the Lord.
zh: 你們作妻子的，要順服丈夫，這在主裡是合宜的。

en: Husbands, love your wives, and do not be harsh with them.
zh: 你們作丈夫的，要愛妻子，不可苦待她們。

en: Children, obey your parents in everything, for this pleases the Lord.
zh: 你們作兒女的，要凡事聽從父母，因為這在主裡是可喜悅的。

en: Fathers, do not provoke your children, lest they become discouraged.
zh: 你們作父親的，不要激怒兒女，免得他們灰心喪志。

en: Slaves, obey in everything those who are your earthly masters, not by way of eye-service, as people-pleasers, but with sincerity of heart, fearing the Lord.
zh: 你們作僕人的，要凡事聽從世上的主人，作事不要只作給人看，像那些討人歡心的一樣，卻要以真誠的心敬畏主。

en: Whatever you do, work heartily, as for the Lord and not for men,
zh: 無論你們作甚麼，都要從心裡去作，像是為主作的，不是為人作的，

en: knowing that from the Lord you will receive the inheritance as your reward. You are serving the Lord Christ.
zh: 因為你們知道，你們一定會從主那裡得到基業為賞賜。你們應當服事主基督，

en: For the wrongdoer will be paid back for the wrong he has done, and there is no partiality.
zh: 但那些不義的人，必按他所行的不義受報應。主並不偏待人。
